title: Comfort Pure Fabric Conditioner Dermatologist-Recommended and Hypoallergenic with a Gently Fresh Fragrance 288 washes (6x 1.44 L)
features: Kind Next to Skin: Discover our no. 1 fabric conditioner for sensitive skin*. Comfort Pure is hypoallergenic and dermatologist recommended by the Skin Health Alliance
Snuggly Soft: This laundry softener leaves your clothes feeling luxuriously soft and is gentle next to your skin
Gentle Freshness: Features a hypoallergenic fragrance that envelops your clothes in a subtle and soothing scent
Suitable for the Entire Family: An excellent choice for washing newborn and baby clothes, this fabric conditioner is gentle next to sensitive skin
Effective in Short and Cold Cycles: Our laundry softener delivers excellent results in various washing conditions. Add this fabric conditioner to your wash along with Persil Non Bio laundry detergent
Sustainability: The bottle and cap for this fabric softener are recyclable (excluding the sleeve)
description: Product Description Infuse your laundry with a touch of care using Comfort Pure, our No. 1 fabric conditioner for sensitive skin*. This gentle fabric softener is kind next to skin, dermatologist recommended through the Skin Health Alliance and hypoallergenic. Suitable for the whole family from washing baby clothes to bedding. Our fabric conditioner performs even in short and cold cycles, leaving your clothes feeling snuggly soft and smelling fresh. How to use: For best results, pour Comfort Pure straight into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine next to your favourite detergent (we recommend Persil Non Bio liquid, powder or capsules). Use 1–2 caps per load. For up to 10x more freshness**, pour Comfort Pure Gently Fresh Scent Booster elixir on top of your laundry softener. Comfort is packaged in a recyclable bottle (excluding the sleeve); please recycle both the bottle and the cap. Elevate your laundry routine with Comfort Pure and indulge in luxurious softness with a gentle, soothing scent. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with using a laundry conditioner specially designed for those with sensitive skin. *Our best-selling sensitive fabric conditioner variant, Nielsen w/e 07/09/24. **Fragrance oil. When dosing 50 ml (full cap) vs washing with Persil Bio Liquid Detergent alone. Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic Surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate. Directions Dose into washing machine drawer, use in every wash, do not pour directly onto fabrics. See more
